one_law: Each Cloud Forge row must be one bounded client-demo recipe: GOAL · DONE · VERIFY · shareable proof artifact.
forbidden: volume-only task packs without per-row recipe

quality_gates.spa_false_pass_law: sourcea.app SPA fallback serves shell HTML for any path — grep data-sa-page or page-unique copy
quality_gates.public_verify_law: Verify = raw HTTPS fetch of the PUBLIC hostname from outside; minimum 60s after deploy; local dist verification is INVALID as PASS.

cloud_sec_numbering.law: Next CLOUD-SEC = max(actual plan id in prior batches) + 1 — never cloud_sec_range summary text alone
cloud_sec_numbering.gap_7402_7466: Phantom range: batch 75 summary claimed ..7466 but only 35 rows shipped (7367-7401); batch 76 generator read summary max not actual ids

motor_shape.note: One proven client recipe per CLOUD-SEC row — not 100 registry refs per row.
